professional_identity.primary_role: Product-led Technical Leader in Responsible AI
professional_identity.positioning_statement: Product-oriented technical leader specialising in the design, delivery, and governance of AI systems that are compliant by design. Combines hands-on engineering and architecture with product ownership, Responsible AI practices, AI audits, and regulatory compliance under GDPR and the EU AI Act.

professional_summary.headline: Product-led Technical Leader in AI Governance,Compliance, and Scalable AI Platforms
professional_summary.summary: Technical Leader and Solutions Architect with over 20 years of experience, including more than 6 years delivering global solutions for United Nations organisations. Strong product mindset with end-to-end ownership of AI products, from discovery and MVP definition to production deployment, governance, and audit readiness. Proven expertise in Generative AI, Cloud Platforms, Responsible AI, GDPR, and EU AI Act compliance, translating regulatory requirements into scalable, secure, and auditable AI products.

product_and_platform_leadership: AI product discovery and risk classification
Operationalisation and adoption of AI products
responsible_ai_and_compliance: EU AI Act readiness and gap analysis
AI audit preparation and evidence generation
architecture_and_cloud: Multi-cloud architecture (Azure, AWS, OCI, IBM Cloud)
security_and_identity: Identity and access management (Azure AD / Entra ID)

product_accountability: Ownership of AI products with compliance-by-design principles
Definition of AI product roadmaps including governance and audit milestones
Alignment of business objectives with regulatory and ethical constraints
governance_and_audit_responsibilities: Integration of Responsible AI principles into AI product design
AI risk analysis aligned with GDPR and EU AI Act
Definition of audit artefacts (data lineage, model purpose,human oversight)
Support for client-facing AI compliance and assurance discussions
